# 2025-11-29 — Saturday

Woke before the alarm, which is new.

Re-read my own PR from yesterday. Disliked three comments I'd left. Edited them.

Rolled back the ollama change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Refactored httpx. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Priya pushed the lora bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Walked to Serra da Estrela after lunch. Got a coffee at Hello Kristof. Thought about nothing.

Walked to Serra da Estrela after lunch. Got a coffee at Copenhagen Coffee Lab. Thought about nothing.

Shipping fast only feels good if the rollback is also fast. That's all.
